title: How Many Sentences?
subject: English
description: Understand sentence boundaries, a first step in reading comprehension and writing.
problem: Write count_sentences(text) that returns how many sentences are in the text. Sentences end with '.', '!' or '?'.
hint: Loop through the text and count characters that are '.', '!' or '?'.

test_cases.label: Three sentences
test_cases.call: count_sentences('Hello. How are you? I am fine!')
